abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Clear the Chaff
abilities.text: This model receives +1 Skl when targeting a non-unique model.

abilities.name: Demise (Explosive)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, deal 2 damage to models within (r)2".

actions.name: Type-7 Incinerator
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (r)2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

triggers.name: Big Boom
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (r) of this action by 1".

triggers.name: Decimate
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a non-unique model.

actions.name: Burn it Down
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (r)2" of the target must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage and gain a Burning token. If they already have a Burning token, they are dealt +2 damage. Then, remove the target.
